---
title: "April 2026"
date: 2026-04-01
categories: [2026, Q2]
description: "National monthly summary of NMC notifications for April 2026 — Category 1 & 2 conditions, provincial breakdown, data quality, and NMC App statistics."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Reporting period: **1 – 30 April 2026**. Data sourced from the NMCSS.
:::

[View Report](../rendered/2026-04-monthly-report.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} &nbsp;
[Download Word](../rendered/2026-04-monthly-report.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary download="2026-04-monthly-report.docx"}
